case_title: MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC VS. EXTREME ENERGY, INC., A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION, ET AL

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S MOTION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENATIVE RULING. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO BOTH RESPONDENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: GORDON AIAVAO, CSR #11216, GAIAVAO@SFTC.ORG (302/HK)

MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-25-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC RECOVERS FROM RESPONDENTS EXTREME ENERGY, INC., A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION, DOING BUSINESS AS EXTREME ENERGY; AND DAVID HORNYAK A TOTAL MONETARY AWARD OF $81,346.55. PETITIONER IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY OF RESPONDENT EXTREME ENERGY, INC. A PENNSYLVANIA CORPORATION, DOING BUSINESS AS EXTREME ENERGY AS OUTLINED IN THE SIGNED JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC MOTION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD AND REQUESTING ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS.

Petitioner Main Street Business Loans, LLC's motion for confirmation of arbitration award is granted as to both respondents. Proofs of service were filed as to both respondents. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/HK)
